headline: Fitch Affirms EA's Senior Notes Expected Ratings Following Covenant Defeasance Revisions
summary: Fitch Ratings has affirmed the expected ratings on the following Electronic Arts Inc. notes after revisions to draft documents regarding the planned covenant defeasance of notes issued under the Base...
